description: Style Note Stretchy and comfy room-to-grow style tee from palm tree, a pint-sized version of his dad's T-shirt. The go-to piece for summertime games and fun, this tee will last longer than his scruffy escapades!Product Details Golden yellow, polo T-shirt with short sleeves, two button placket, print on left chest and right sleeveMaterial and Care 100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
